case_title: HARRAH'S OPERATING COMPANY INC. vs. WONG, KUANLIN

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRAH'S OPERATING COMPANY INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KUANLIN SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-13-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-14-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-26-1998

CORRESPONDENCE RE;STATUS CONFERENCE AND BANKRUPTCY RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRAH'S OPERATING COMPANY INC.
